data Any where Value :: Columnable a => a -> Any

type DataFrame.DecisionTree.ColumnOrdering :: *
newtype DataFrame.DecisionTree.ColumnOrdering = DataFrame.DecisionTree.ColumnOrdering (Map SomeTypeRep DataFrame.DecisionTree.OrdDict)
type DataFrame :: *
data DataFrame = DataFrame {columns :: Vector Column, columnIndices :: Map Text Int, dataframeDimensions :: (Int, Int), derivingExpressions :: Map Text UExpr}
type DataFrameException :: *
data DataFrameException where TypeMismatchException :: (Typeable a, Typeable b) => TypeErrorContext a b -> DataFrameException AggregatedAndNonAggregatedException :: Text -> Text -> DataFrameException ColumnsNotFoundException :: [Text] -> Text -> [Text] -> DataFrameException EmptyDataSetException :: Text -> DataFrameException InternalException :: Text -> DataFrameException NonColumnReferenceException :: Text -> DataFrameException UnaggregatedException :: Text -> DataFrameException WrongQuantileNumberException :: Int -> DataFrameException WrongQuantileIndexException :: Vector Int -> Int -> DataFrameException

data DataFrame.DecisionTree.Direction = DataFrame.DecisionTree.GoLeft | DataFrame.DecisionTree.GoRight
type DataFrame.Display.DisplayOptions :: *
data DataFrame.Display.DisplayOptions = DataFrame.Display.DisplayOptions {DataFrame.Display.displayTruncate :: Maybe TruncateConfig}
type role Expr nominal
type Expr :: * -> *
data Expr a where Col :: Columnable a => Text -> Expr a CastWith :: (Columnable a1, Columnable a, Read a1) => Text -> Text -> (Either String a1 -> a) -> Expr a CastExprWith :: (Columnable a1, Columnable a, Columnable src, Read a1) => Text -> (Either String a1 -> a) -> Expr src -> Expr a Lit :: Columnable a => a -> Expr a Unary :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => UnaryOp b a -> Expr b -> Expr a Binary :: (Columnable c, Columnable b, Columnable a) => BinaryOp c b a -> Expr c -> Expr b -> Expr a If :: Columnable a => Expr Bool -> Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr a Agg :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => AggStrategy a b -> Expr b -> Expr a Over :: Columnable a => [Text] -> Expr a -> Expr a
type GroupedDataFrame :: *
data GroupedDataFrame = Grouped {fullDataframe :: DataFrame, groupedColumns :: [Text], valueIndices :: Vector Int, offsets :: Vector Int, rowToGroup :: Vector Int}
type DataFrame.Typed.Record.HasSchema :: * -> Constraint
class DataFrame.Typed.Record.HasSchema a where type DataFrame.Typed.Record.Schema :: * -> [*] type family DataFrame.Typed.Record.Schema a DataFrame.Typed.Record.toColumns :: [a] -> [(Text, Column)] DataFrame.Typed.Record.fromColumns :: DataFrame -> Either Text [a] {-# MINIMAL toColumns, fromColumns #-}
type HeaderSpec :: *
data HeaderSpec = NoHeader | UseFirstRow | ProvideNames [Text]

rowValue :: Expr a -> [(Text, Any)] -> Maybe a
DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.runDataFrame :: DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.LazyDataFrame -> IO DataFrame
safeApply :: (Columnable b, Columnable c) => (b -> c) -> Text -> DataFrame -> Either DataFrameException DataFrame
sample :: random-1.3.1:System.Random.Internal.RandomGen g => g -> Double -> DataFrame -> DataFrame
DataFrame.Synthesis.satisfiesExamples :: DataFrame -> TypedColumn Double -> Expr Double -> Bool
DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.scanCsv :: Schema -> Text -> DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.LazyDataFrame
DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.scanCsvWith :: CsvReader -> Schema -> Text -> DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.LazyDataFrame
DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.scanParquet :: Schema -> Text -> DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.LazyDataFrame
DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.scanSeparated :: Char -> Schema -> Text -> DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.LazyDataFrame
DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.scanSeparatedWith :: CsvReader -> Char -> Schema -> Text -> DataFrame.Lazy.Internal.DataFrame.LazyDataFrame
Plot.scatter :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Scatter -> DataFrame -> IO ()
schemaType :: (Columnable a, Read a) => SchemaType
select :: [Text] -> DataFrame -> DataFrame
selectBy :: [SelectionCriteria] -> DataFrame -> DataFrame
showDerivedExpressions :: DataFrame -> [NamedExpr]
shuffle :: random-1.3.1:System.Random.Internal.RandomGen g => g -> DataFrame -> DataFrame
skewness :: (Columnable a, Real a, Vector.Unboxed.Base.Unbox a) => Expr a -> DataFrame -> Double
sortBy :: [SortOrder] -> DataFrame -> DataFrame
standardDeviation :: (Columnable a, Real a, Vector.Unboxed.Base.Unbox a) => Expr a -> DataFrame -> Double

stratifiedSplit :: (SplittableGen g, Columnable a) => g -> Double -> Expr a -> DataFrame -> (DataFrame, DataFrame)
sum :: (Columnable a, Num a) => Expr a -> DataFrame -> a
summarize :: DataFrame -> DataFrame

take :: Int -> DataFrame -> DataFrame
takeLast :: Int -> DataFrame -> DataFrame

toCsv' :: DataFrame -> String

toFloatMatrix :: DataFrame -> Either DataFrameException (Vector (Vector Float))
toIntMatrix :: DataFrame -> Either DataFrameException (Vector (Vector Int))

toMarkdown' :: DataFrame -> String

valueProportions :: (Ord a, Columnable a) => Expr a -> DataFrame -> [(a, Double)]

wrongQuantileIndexError :: Vector Int -> Int -> String
wrongQuantileNumberError :: Int -> String

-- DataFrame.Functions: column references, lifts, declareColumns
DataFrame.Functions.and :: Expr Bool -> Expr Bool -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.bind :: (Columnable a, Columnable (m a), Monad m, Columnable b, Columnable (m b)) => (a -> m b) -> Expr (m a) -> Expr (m b)
DataFrame.Functions.cast :: (Columnable a, Read a) => Text -> Expr (Maybe a)
DataFrame.Functions.castEither :: (Columnable a, Read a) => Text -> Expr (Either Text a)
DataFrame.Functions.castExpr :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => Expr src -> Expr (Maybe b)
DataFrame.Functions.castExprEither :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => Expr src -> Expr (Either Text b)
DataFrame.Functions.castExprWithDefault :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => b -> Expr src -> Expr b
DataFrame.Functions.castWithDefault :: (Columnable a, Read a) => a -> Text -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.collect :: Columnable a => Expr a -> Expr [a]
DataFrame.Functions.count :: Columnable a => Expr a -> Expr Int
DataFrame.Functions.countAll :: Expr Int
DataFrame.Functions.daysBetween :: Expr time-1.14:Data.Time.Calendar.Days.Day -> Expr time-1.14:Data.Time.Calendar.Days.Day -> Expr Int
DataFrame.Functions.div :: (Integral a, Columnable a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.eq :: (Columnable a, Eq a, a ~ BaseType a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.firstOrNothing :: Columnable a => Expr [a] -> Expr (Maybe a)
DataFrame.Functions.fromJust :: Columnable a => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.fromMaybe :: Columnable a => a -> Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.geq :: (Columnable a, Ord a, Eq a, a ~ BaseType a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.gt :: (Columnable a, Ord a, a ~ BaseType a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.isHaskellIdentifier :: Text -> Bool
DataFrame.Functions.isJust :: Columnable a => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.isNothing :: Columnable a => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.isReservedId :: Text -> Bool
DataFrame.Functions.isVarId :: Text -> Bool
DataFrame.Functions.lastOrNothing :: Columnable a => Expr [a] -> Expr (Maybe a)
DataFrame.Functions.leq :: (Columnable a, Ord a, Eq a, a ~ BaseType a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.lift :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => (a -> b) -> Expr a -> Expr b
DataFrame.Functions.lift2 :: (Columnable c, Columnable b, Columnable a) => (c -> b -> a) -> Expr c -> Expr b -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.lt :: (Columnable a, Ord a, a ~ BaseType a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.match :: Text -> Expr Text -> Expr (Maybe Text)
DataFrame.Functions.matchAll :: Text -> Expr Text -> Expr [Text]
DataFrame.Functions.max :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.maximum :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.mean :: (Columnable a, Real a) => Expr a -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.meanMaybe :: (Columnable a, Real a) => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.median :: (Columnable a, Real a, Vector.Unboxed.Base.Unbox a) => Expr a -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.medianMaybe :: (Columnable a, Real a) => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.min :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.minimum :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.mod :: (Integral a, Columnable a) => Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.mode :: (Ord a, Columnable a, Eq a) => Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.not :: Expr Bool -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.nullLift :: (NullLift1Op a r (NullLift1Result a r), Columnable (NullLift1Result a r)) => (BaseType a -> r) -> Expr a -> Expr (NullLift1Result a r)
DataFrame.Functions.nullLift2 :: (NullLift2Op a b r (NullLift2Result a b r), Columnable (NullLift2Result a b r)) => (BaseType a -> BaseType b -> r) -> Expr a -> Expr b -> Expr (NullLift2Result a b r)
DataFrame.Functions.optionalToDoubleVector :: Real a => Vector (Maybe a) -> Vector Double
DataFrame.Functions.or :: Expr Bool -> Expr Bool -> Expr Bool
DataFrame.Functions.over :: Columnable a => [Text] -> Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.parseDate :: (time-1.14:Data.Time.Format.Parse.Class.ParseTime t, Columnable t) => Text -> Expr Text -> Expr (Maybe t)
DataFrame.Functions.percentile :: Int -> Expr Double -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.pow :: (Columnable a, Num a) => Expr a -> Int -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.recode :: (Columnable a, Columnable b, Show (a, b)) => [(a, b)] -> Expr a -> Expr (Maybe b)
DataFrame.Functions.recodeWithCondition :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => Expr b -> [(Expr a -> Expr Bool, b)] -> Expr a -> Expr b
DataFrame.Functions.recodeWithDefault :: (Columnable a, Columnable b, Show (a, b)) => b -> [(a, b)] -> Expr a -> Expr b
DataFrame.Functions.reduce :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => Expr b -> a -> (a -> b -> a) -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.relu :: (Columnable a, Num a, Ord a) => Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.sanitize :: Text -> Text
DataFrame.Functions.splitOn :: Text -> Expr Text -> Expr [Text]
DataFrame.Functions.stddev :: (Columnable a, Real a, Vector.Unboxed.Base.Unbox a) => Expr a -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.stddevMaybe :: (Columnable a, Real a) => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.sum :: (Columnable a, Num a) => Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.sumMaybe :: (Columnable a, Num a) => Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.toDouble :: (Columnable a, Real a) => Expr a -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.toMaybe :: Columnable a => Expr a -> Expr (Maybe a)
DataFrame.Functions.unsafeCast :: (Columnable a, Read a) => Text -> Expr a
DataFrame.Functions.unsafeCastExpr :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => Expr src -> Expr b
DataFrame.Functions.variance :: (Columnable a, Real a, Vector.Unboxed.Base.Unbox a) => Expr a -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Functions.whenBothPresent :: (Columnable a, Columnable b, Columnable c) => (a -> b -> c) -> Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr (Maybe b) -> Expr (Maybe c)
DataFrame.Functions.whenPresent :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => (a -> b) -> Expr (Maybe a) -> Expr (Maybe b)
DataFrame.Functions.zScore :: Expr Double -> Expr Double
DataFrame.Operators.as :: Columnable a => Expr a -> Text -> NamedExpr
DataFrame.Operators.col :: Columnable a => Text -> Expr a
DataFrame.Operators.ifThenElse :: Columnable a => Expr Bool -> Expr a -> Expr a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Operators.lift2Decorated :: (Columnable c, Columnable b, Columnable a) => (c -> b -> a) -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Bool -> Int -> Expr c -> Expr b -> Expr a
DataFrame.Operators.liftDecorated :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => (a -> b) -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Expr a -> Expr b
DataFrame.Operators.lit :: Columnable a => a -> Expr a
DataFrame.Operators.name :: Show a => Expr a -> Text
-- DataFrame.Typed: compile-time-typed dataframe (PREFERRED — type-safe columns, better error messages)
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> Constraint
class DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol names where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.symbolVals :: [Text] {-# MINIMAL symbolVals #-}
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append :: [k] -> [k] -> [k]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append xs ys where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append '[] ys = ys DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (x : xs) ys = x : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append xs ys
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAbsent :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> Constraint
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAbsent name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAbsent name cols = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAbsentHelper name (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name cols) cols
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresent :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> Constraint
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresent name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresent (name : rest) cols = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresentHelper (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name cols) name rest cols DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresent '[] cols = () :: Constraint
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> Constraint
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent name cols = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresentHelper name (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name cols) cols
type role DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column phantom phantom
type DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> * -> *
data DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ExcludeSchema :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ExcludeSchema names cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ExcludeSchema names '[] = '[] DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ExcludeSchema names (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n a : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ExcludeSchemaHelper (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.IsElem n names) n a names rest
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.FullOuterJoinSchema :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.FullOuterJoinSchema keys left right where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.FullOuterJoinSchema keys left right = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.WrapMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema keys left)) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.WrapMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft left (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames right)))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.WrapMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft right (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames left)))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.CollidingColumns left right keys)))
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.GroupKeyColumns :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.GroupKeyColumns keys cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.GroupKeyColumns keys '[] = '[] DataFrame.Typed.Schema.GroupKeyColumns keys (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n a : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.GroupKeyColumnsHelper (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.IsElem n keys) n a keys rest
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> Bool
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name _1 : _2) = True DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column _1 _2 : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.HasName name '[] = False
type DataFrame.Typed.Record.HasSchema :: * -> Constraint
class DataFrame.Typed.Record.HasSchema a where type DataFrame.Typed.Record.Schema :: * -> [*] type family DataFrame.Typed.Record.Schema a DataFrame.Typed.Record.toColumns :: [a] -> [(Text, Column)] DataFrame.Typed.Record.fromColumns :: DataFrame -> Either Text [a] {-# MINIMAL toColumns, fromColumns #-}
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name (Maybe a) : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name _1 : rest) = (TypeError ...) DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute name (col : rest) = col : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute name rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Impute name '[] = '[]
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.InnerJoinSchema :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.InnerJoinSchema keys left right where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.InnerJoinSchema keys left right = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema keys left) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft left (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames right))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft right (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames left))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.CollidingColumns left right keys)))
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.KnownSchema :: [*] -> Constraint
class DataFrame.Typed.Schema.KnownSchema cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.schemaEvidence :: [(Text, SomeTypeRep)] {-# MINIMAL schemaEvidence #-}
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.LeftJoinSchema :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.LeftJoinSchema keys left right where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.LeftJoinSchema keys left right = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema keys left) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft left (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames right))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.WrapMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft right (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames left)))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.CollidingColumns left right keys)))
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> *
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : _1) = a DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column _1 _2 : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup name rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup name '[] = (TypeError ...)
type DataFrame.Typed.Generic.NameCase :: *
data DataFrame.Typed.Generic.NameCase = DataFrame.Typed.Generic.SnakeCase | DataFrame.Typed.Generic.IdentityCase
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RemoveColumn :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RemoveColumn name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RemoveColumn name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name _1 : rest) = rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RemoveColumn name (col : rest) = col : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RemoveColumn name rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RemoveColumn name '[] = '[]
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column old a : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column new a : rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new (col : rest) = col : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new '[] = (TypeError ...)
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameManyInSchema :: [(ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol, ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol)] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameManyInSchema pairs cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameManyInSchema '[] cols = cols DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameManyInSchema ('(old, new) : rest) cols = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameManyInSchema rest (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new cols)
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Reverse :: [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Reverse xs where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Reverse xs = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ReverseAcc xs '[]
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RightJoinSchema :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RightJoinSchema keys left right where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RightJoinSchema keys left right = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema keys right) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.WrapMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft left (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames right)))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.UniqueLeft right (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append keys (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.ColumnNames left))) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.CollidingColumns left right keys)))
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> *
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : _1) = a DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column _1 _2 : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name '[] = Int
type DataFrame.Typed.Generic.SchemaOf :: * -> [*]
type DataFrame.Typed.Generic.SchemaOf a = DataFrame.Typed.Generic.RepToSchema DataFrame.Typed.Generic.SnakeCase (GHC.Generics.Rep a) :: [*]
type DataFrame.Typed.Generic.SchemaOfRaw :: * -> [*]
type DataFrame.Typed.Generic.SchemaOfRaw a = DataFrame.Typed.Generic.RepToSchema DataFrame.Typed.Generic.IdentityCase (GHC.Generics.Rep a) :: [*]
type dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.SchemaOptions :: *
data dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.SchemaOptions = dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.SchemaOptions {dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.nameTransform :: String -> String, dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.schemaTypeName :: Maybe String, dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.generateInstance :: Bool}
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe :: [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe '[] = '[] DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n (Maybe a) : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n a : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n a : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n a : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripAllMaybe rest
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt :: ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt name cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name (Maybe a) : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt name (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : rest) = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt name (col : rest) = col : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt name rest DataFrame.Typed.Schema.StripMaybeAt name '[] = (TypeError ...)
type DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> [*]
type family DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema names cols where DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema '[] cols = '[] DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema (n : ns) cols = DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column n (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup n cols) : DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema ns cols
type role DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr phantom nominal
type DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr :: [*] -> * -> *
newtype DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a = DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr {DataFrame.Typed.Types.unTExpr :: Expr a}
type role DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder phantom
type DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder :: [*] -> *
data DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder cols where DataFrame.Typed.Types.Asc :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder cols DataFrame.Typed.Types.Desc :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder cols
type These :: * -> * -> *
data These a b = This a | That b | These a b
type role DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame phantom
type DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame :: [*] -> *
newtype DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols = DataFrame.Typed.Types.TDF {DataFrame.Typed.Types.unTDF :: DataFrame}
type role DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedGrouped phantom phantom
type DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedGrouped :: [ghc-prim-0.10.0:GHC.Types.Symbol] -> [*] -> *
newtype DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedGrouped keys cols = DataFrame.Typed.Types.TGD {DataFrame.Typed.Types.unTGD :: GroupedDataFrame}
DataFrame.Typed.Aggregate.aggregate :: (DataFrame.Typed.Types.TAgg keys cols '[] -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TAgg keys cols aggs) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedGrouped keys cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Append (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.GroupKeyColumns keys cols) (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Reverse aggs))
DataFrame.Typed.Aggregate.aggregateUntyped :: [NamedExpr] -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedGrouped keys cols -> DataFrame
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.append :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
DataFrame.Typed.Aggregate.as :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, Columnable a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TAgg keys cols aggs -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TAgg keys cols (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : aggs)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.asc :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder cols
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.castExpr :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols src -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols (Maybe b)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.castExprEither :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols src -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols (Either Text b)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.castExprWithDefault :: (Columnable b, Columnable src, Read b) => b -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols src -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols b
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.cloneColumn :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol old, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol new, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent old cols, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAbsent new cols) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column new (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.Lookup old cols) : cols)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.col :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, a ~ DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name cols, Columnable a, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent name cols) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.collect :: Columnable a => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols [a]
DataFrame.Typed.Access.columnAsList :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, a ~ DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name cols, Columnable a, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent name cols) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> [a]

DataFrame.Typed.Operations.columnNames :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> [Text]

DataFrame.Typed.Expr.countAll :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols Int
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.cube :: (Int, Int) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.defaultSchemaOptions :: dataframe-th-1.0.1.0:DataFrame.Typed.TH.Records.SchemaOptions

DataFrame.Typed.Operations.filterWhere :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols Bool -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols

DataFrame.Typed.Record.fromRecordsTyped :: DataFrame.Typed.Record.HasSchema a => [a] -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Record.Schema a)
DataFrame.Typed.Join.fullOuterJoin :: DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol keys => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame left -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame right -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.FullOuterJoinSchema keys left right)

DataFrame.Typed.Generic.genericToColumns :: (GHC.Generics.Generic a, DataFrame.Typed.Generic.GHasColumns (GHC.Generics.Rep a)) => [a] -> [(Text, Column)]

DataFrame.Typed.Operations.insert :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, Columnable a, Foldable t, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAbsent name cols) => t a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Types.Column name a : cols)

DataFrame.Typed.Join.leftJoin :: DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol keys => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame left -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame right -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.LeftJoinSchema keys left right)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.lift :: (Columnable a, Columnable b) => (a -> b) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols b
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.lift2 :: (Columnable a, Columnable b, Columnable c) => (a -> b -> c) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols b -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols c
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.lit :: Columnable a => a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.maximum :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.mean :: (Columnable a, Real a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols Double
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.minimum :: (Columnable a, Ord a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.nColumns :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> Int
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.nRows :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> Int
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.not :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols Bool -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols Bool
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.nullLift :: (NullLift1Op a r (NullLift1Result a r), Columnable (NullLift1Result a r)) => (BaseType a -> r) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols (NullLift1Result a r)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.nullLift2 :: (NullLift2Op a b r (NullLift2Result a b r), Columnable (NullLift2Result a b r)) => (BaseType a -> BaseType b -> r) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols b -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols (NullLift2Result a b r)
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.over :: (Columnable a, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol names, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresent names cols) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.range :: (Int, Int) -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.rename :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol old, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol new) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameInSchema old new cols)
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.renameMany :: DataFrame.Typed.Operations.AllKnownPairs pairs => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RenameManyInSchema pairs cols)
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.replaceColumn :: (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, Columnable a, a ~ DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SafeLookup name cols, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertPresent name cols) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
DataFrame.Typed.Join.rightJoin :: DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol keys => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame left -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame right -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.RightJoinSchema keys left right)
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.sample :: random-1.3.1:System.Random.Internal.RandomGen g => g -> Double -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.select :: (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AllKnownSymbol names, DataFrame.Typed.Schema.AssertAllPresent names cols) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame (DataFrame.Typed.Schema.SubsetSchema names cols)
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.shuffle :: random-1.3.1:System.Random.Internal.RandomGen g => g -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
DataFrame.Typed.Operations.sortBy :: [DataFrame.Typed.Types.TSortOrder cols] -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols

DataFrame.Typed.Operations.takeLast :: Int -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
DataFrame.Typed.Freeze.thaw :: DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols -> DataFrame
DataFrame.Typed.Expr.toDouble :: (Columnable a, Real a) => DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols a -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TExpr cols Double

DataFrame.Typed.Freeze.unsafeFreeze :: DataFrame -> DataFrame.Typed.Types.TypedDataFrame cols
-- Plot: interactive HTML plots
type Plot.Bar :: *
data Plot.Bar = Plot.Bar {Plot.x :: Text, Plot.y :: Maybe Text, Plot.agg :: dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Agg, Plot.topN :: Maybe Int, Plot.title :: Maybe Text, Plot.size :: Plot.Size}
type Plot.Box :: *
data Plot.Box = Plot.Box {Plot.y :: [Text], Plot.title :: Maybe Text, Plot.size :: Plot.Size}
type Plot.Histogram :: *
data Plot.Histogram = Plot.Histogram {Plot.x :: Text, Plot.bins :: Int, Plot.title :: Maybe Text, Plot.size :: Plot.Size}
type Plot.HtmlPlot :: *
newtype Plot.HtmlPlot = Plot.HtmlPlot Text
type Plot.Line :: *
data Plot.Line = Plot.Line {Plot.x :: Text, Plot.y :: [Text], Plot.title :: Maybe Text, Plot.size :: Plot.Size}
type Plot.Pie :: *
data Plot.Pie = Plot.Pie {Plot.values :: Text, Plot.names :: Maybe Text, Plot.agg :: dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Agg, Plot.topN :: Maybe Int, Plot.title :: Maybe Text, Plot.size :: Plot.Size}
type Plot.Scatter :: *
data Plot.Scatter = Plot.Scatter {Plot.x :: Text, Plot.y :: Text, Plot.color :: Maybe Text, Plot.title :: Maybe Text, Plot.size :: Plot.Size}
type Plot.Size :: *
data Plot.Size = Plot.Size {Plot.width :: Int, Plot.height :: Int}
Plot.allHistograms :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.bar :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Bar -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.box :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Box -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.defaultSize :: Plot.Size
Plot.histogram :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Histogram -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.line :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Line -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.mkBar :: Text -> Plot.Bar
Plot.mkBox :: [Text] -> Plot.Box
Plot.mkHistogram :: Text -> Plot.Histogram
Plot.mkLine :: Text -> [Text] -> Plot.Line
Plot.mkPie :: Text -> Plot.Pie
Plot.mkScatter :: Text -> Text -> Plot.Scatter
Plot.pie :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Pie -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.plotBars :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Text -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.plotBoxPlots :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => [Text] -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.plotHistogram :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Text -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.plotLines :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Text -> [Text] -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.plotPie :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Text -> Maybe Text -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.plotScatter :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Text -> Text -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.scatter :: GHC.Stack.Types.HasCallStack => Plot.Scatter -> DataFrame -> IO Plot.HtmlPlot
Plot.showInDefaultBrowser :: Plot.HtmlPlot -> IO ()
type dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Agg :: *
data dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Agg = dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Count | dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Sum | dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Mean | dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Median | dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Min | dataframe-viz-1.0.1.1:Common.Max
-- Granite.Svg: legacy one-shot SVG charts (bars, pie, lineGraph, boxPlot; quick single-series plots)
Granite.Svg.area :: [(Text, [(Double, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.bars :: [(Text, Double)] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.boxPlot :: [(Text, [Double])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.density :: [(Text, [Double])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.distPlot :: [(Text, [Double])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.errorBars :: [(Text, [(Double, Double, Double, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.funnel :: [(Text, Double)] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.heatmap :: [[Double]] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.histogram :: Granite.Bins -> [Double] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.lineGraph :: [(Text, [(Double, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.pie :: [(Text, Double)] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.polarLine :: [(Text, [(Double, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.ribbon :: [(Text, [(Double, Double, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.scatter :: [(Text, [(Double, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.stackedBars :: [(Text, [(Text, Double)])] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
Granite.Svg.waterfall :: [(Text, Double, Double)] -> Granite.Plot -> Text
type Granite.AxisEnv :: *
data Granite.AxisEnv = Granite.AxisEnv {Granite.domain :: (Double, Double), Granite.tickIndex :: Int, Granite.tickCount :: Int}
type Granite.Bins :: *
data Granite.Bins = Granite.Bins {Granite.nBins :: Int, Granite.lo :: Double, Granite.hi :: Double}
pattern Granite.Color.Black :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.Blue :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightBlack :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightBlue :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightCyan :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightGreen :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightMagenta :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightRed :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightWhite :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.BrightYellow :: Granite.Color.Color
type Granite.Color.Color :: *
data Granite.Color.Color = Granite.Color.Color GHC.Word.Word8 GHC.Word.Word8 GHC.Word.Word8
pattern Granite.Color.Cyan :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.Default :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.Green :: Granite.Color.Color
type Granite.LabelFormatter :: *
type Granite.LabelFormatter = Granite.AxisEnv -> Int -> Double -> Text
type Granite.LegendPos :: *
data Granite.LegendPos = Granite.LegendRight | Granite.LegendBottom | Granite.LegendNone
pattern Granite.Color.Magenta :: Granite.Color.Color
type Granite.Plot :: *
data Granite.Plot = Granite.Plot {Granite.widthChars :: Int, Granite.heightChars :: Int, Granite.leftMargin :: Int, Granite.bottomMargin :: Int, Granite.titleMargin :: Int, Granite.xBounds :: (Maybe Double, Maybe Double), Granite.yBounds :: (Maybe Double, Maybe Double), Granite.plotTitle :: Text, Granite.legendPos :: !Granite.LegendPos, Granite.colorPalette :: ![Granite.Color.Color], Granite.xFormatter :: !Granite.LabelFormatter, Granite.yFormatter :: !Granite.LabelFormatter, Granite.xNumTicks :: Int, Granite.yNumTicks :: Int}
pattern Granite.Color.Red :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.White :: Granite.Color.Color
pattern Granite.Color.Yellow :: Granite.Color.Color
Granite.bins :: Int -> Double -> Double -> Granite.Bins
Granite.defPlot :: Granite.Plot
Granite.series :: Text -> [(Double, Double)] -> (Text, [(Double, Double)])
-- Granite.Spec: grammar-of-graphics chart spec (Chart/Layer/Geom/Stat/Mapping; build via emptyChart/defLayer/emptyMapping; re-exports Granite.Data.Frame fromColumns/ColNum/ColCat; supports layering, facets, stats, polar/log scales)
type Granite.Spec.AesDefaults :: *
data Granite.Spec.AesDefaults = Granite.Spec.AesDefaults {Granite.Spec.defColor :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColorSpec), Granite.Spec.defFill :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColorSpec), Granite.Spec.defSize :: !(Maybe Double), Granite.Spec.defAlpha :: !(Maybe Double), Granite.Spec.defLineWidth :: !(Maybe Double), Granite.Spec.defLineDash :: !(Maybe [Double])}
type Granite.Spec.BinSpec :: *
data Granite.Spec.BinSpec = Granite.Spec.BinByCount Int | Granite.Spec.BinByWidth Double | Granite.Spec.BinByEdges ![Double]
type Granite.Spec.BreaksSpec :: *
data Granite.Spec.BreaksSpec = Granite.Spec.BreaksNice | Granite.Spec.BreaksCount Int | Granite.Spec.BreaksAt ![Double]
type Granite.Spec.Chart :: *
data Granite.Spec.Chart = Granite.Spec.Chart {Granite.Spec.chartData :: !Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame, Granite.Spec.chartLayers :: ![Granite.Spec.Layer], Granite.Spec.chartScales :: Granite.Spec.Scales, Granite.Spec.chartCoord :: !Granite.Spec.Coord, Granite.Spec.chartFacet :: !Granite.Spec.Facet, Granite.Spec.chartTheme :: Granite.Spec.Theme, Granite.Spec.chartTitle :: !(Maybe Text), Granite.Spec.chartSize :: !Granite.Spec.Size}
type Granite.Spec.ColorSpec :: *
data Granite.Spec.ColorSpec = Granite.Spec.NamedColor Granite.Color.Color | Granite.Spec.RGB GHC.Word.Word8 GHC.Word.Word8 GHC.Word.Word8 | Granite.Spec.Hex Text
type Granite.Spec.ColumnRef :: *
newtype Granite.Spec.ColumnRef = Granite.Spec.ColumnRef Text
type Granite.Spec.Coord :: *
data Granite.Spec.Coord = Granite.Spec.CoordCartesian | Granite.Spec.CoordFlip | Granite.Spec.CoordPolar !Granite.Spec.PolarAes Double !Granite.Spec.PolarDir
type Granite.Spec.Expand :: *
data Granite.Spec.Expand = Granite.Spec.Expand {Granite.Spec.expandMult :: Double, Granite.Spec.expandAdd :: Double}
type Granite.Spec.Facet :: *
data Granite.Spec.Facet = Granite.Spec.FacetNull | Granite.Spec.FacetWrap ! (Granite.Spec.N:ColumnRef[0])Granite.Spec.ColumnRef !(Maybe Int) !(Maybe Int) !Granite.Spec.FacetScales | Granite.Spec.FacetGrid ![Granite.Spec.ColumnRef] ![Granite.Spec.ColumnRef] !Granite.Spec.FacetScales
type Granite.Spec.FacetScales :: *
data Granite.Spec.FacetScales = Granite.Spec.ScalesFixed | Granite.Spec.ScalesFreeX | Granite.Spec.ScalesFreeY | Granite.Spec.ScalesFree
type Granite.Spec.Geom :: *
data Granite.Spec.Geom = Granite.Spec.GeomPoint | Granite.Spec.GeomLine | Granite.Spec.GeomBar | Granite.Spec.GeomCol | Granite.Spec.GeomRibbon | Granite.Spec.GeomErrorbar | Granite.Spec.GeomTile | Granite.Spec.GeomBoxplot | Granite.Spec.GeomDensity | Granite.Spec.GeomHistogram | Granite.Spec.GeomText | Granite.Spec.GeomArc
type Granite.Spec.Layer :: *
data Granite.Spec.Layer = Granite.Spec.Layer {Granite.Spec.layerData :: !(Maybe Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame), Granite.Spec.layerMapping :: Granite.Spec.Mapping, Granite.Spec.layerGeom :: !Granite.Spec.Geom, Granite.Spec.layerStat :: !Granite.Spec.Stat, Granite.Spec.layerPosition :: !Granite.Spec.Position, Granite.Spec.layerAesDef :: Granite.Spec.AesDefaults}
type Granite.Spec.LogBase :: *
data Granite.Spec.LogBase = Granite.Spec.Base2 | Granite.Spec.BaseE | Granite.Spec.Base10
type Granite.Spec.Mapping :: *
data Granite.Spec.Mapping = Granite.Spec.Mapping {Granite.Spec.aesX :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesY :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesColor :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesFill :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesSize :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesAlpha :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesGroup :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesYmin :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesYmax :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef), Granite.Spec.aesLabel :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.ColumnRef)}
type Granite.Spec.PolarAes :: *
data Granite.Spec.PolarAes = Granite.Spec.ThetaX | Granite.Spec.ThetaY
type Granite.Spec.PolarDir :: *
data Granite.Spec.PolarDir = Granite.Spec.PolarCW | Granite.Spec.PolarCCW
type Granite.Spec.Position :: *
data Granite.Spec.Position = Granite.Spec.PosIdentity | Granite.Spec.PosStack | Granite.Spec.PosDodge Double | Granite.Spec.PosJitter Double Double | Granite.Spec.PosFill
type Granite.Spec.Scale :: *
data Granite.Spec.Scale = Granite.Spec.SLinear Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts | Granite.Spec.SLog !Granite.Spec.LogBase Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts | Granite.Spec.SSqrt Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts | Granite.Spec.SReverse !Granite.Spec.Scale | Granite.Spec.SIdentity | Granite.Spec.SDiscrete | Granite.Spec.SColorContinuous ![Granite.Spec.ColorSpec] | Granite.Spec.SColorDiscrete ![Granite.Spec.ColorSpec]
type Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts :: *
data Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts = Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts {Granite.Spec.scaleDomain :: !(Maybe (Double, Double)), Granite.Spec.scaleBreaks :: !Granite.Spec.BreaksSpec, Granite.Spec.scaleLabels :: !Granite.Format.Formatter, Granite.Spec.scaleExpand :: Granite.Spec.Expand, Granite.Spec.scaleClip :: !Bool}
type Granite.Spec.Scales :: *
data Granite.Spec.Scales = Granite.Spec.Scales {Granite.Spec.scaleX :: !Granite.Spec.Scale, Granite.Spec.scaleY :: !Granite.Spec.Scale, Granite.Spec.scaleColor :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.Scale), Granite.Spec.scaleFill :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.Scale), Granite.Spec.scaleSize :: !(Maybe Granite.Spec.Scale)}
type Granite.Spec.Size :: *
data Granite.Spec.Size = Granite.Spec.SizeChars Int Int | Granite.Spec.SizePixels Int Int | Granite.Spec.SizeResponsive Double
type Granite.Spec.SmoothMethod :: *
data Granite.Spec.SmoothMethod = Granite.Spec.SmoothLm | Granite.Spec.SmoothLoess Double | Granite.Spec.SmoothMovingAvg Int
type Granite.Spec.Stat :: *
data Granite.Spec.Stat = Granite.Spec.StatIdentity | Granite.Spec.StatBin !Granite.Spec.BinSpec | Granite.Spec.StatDensity | Granite.Spec.StatSmooth !Granite.Spec.SmoothMethod | Granite.Spec.StatBoxplot | Granite.Spec.StatCount | Granite.Spec.StatSummary !Granite.Spec.SummaryFun
type Granite.Spec.SummaryFun :: *
data Granite.Spec.SummaryFun = Granite.Spec.SumMean | Granite.Spec.SumMedian | Granite.Spec.SumQuantile Double | Granite.Spec.SumSum
type Granite.Spec.Theme :: *
data Granite.Spec.Theme = Granite.Spec.Theme {Granite.Spec.themePalette :: ![Granite.Spec.ColorSpec], Granite.Spec.themePieColors :: ![Granite.Spec.ColorSpec], Granite.Spec.themeAxisColor :: !Granite.Spec.ColorSpec, Granite.Spec.themeGridColor :: !Granite.Spec.ColorSpec, Granite.Spec.themeTextColor :: !Granite.Spec.ColorSpec, Granite.Spec.themeBackground :: !Granite.Spec.ColorSpec, Granite.Spec.themeFontSize :: Double, Granite.Spec.themeTitleSize :: Double, Granite.Spec.themeStrokeWidth :: Double, Granite.Spec.themePxPerChar :: Double, Granite.Spec.themePxPerLine :: Double}
Granite.Spec.defLayer :: Granite.Spec.Geom -> Granite.Spec.Layer
Granite.Spec.defScaleOpts :: Granite.Spec.ScaleOpts
Granite.Spec.defScales :: Granite.Spec.Scales
Granite.Spec.defTheme :: Granite.Spec.Theme
Granite.Spec.emptyAesDefaults :: Granite.Spec.AesDefaults
Granite.Spec.emptyChart :: Granite.Spec.Chart
Granite.Spec.emptyMapping :: Granite.Spec.Mapping
type Granite.Data.Frame.Column :: *
data Granite.Data.Frame.Column = Granite.Data.Frame.ColNum ![Double] | Granite.Data.Frame.ColCat ![Text] | Granite.Data.Frame.ColTime ![GHC.Int.Int64] | Granite.Data.Frame.ColBool ![Bool]
type Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame :: *
newtype Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame = Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame {Granite.Data.Frame.unDataFrame :: [(Text, Granite.Data.Frame.Column)]}
type Granite.Format.Formatter :: *
data Granite.Format.Formatter = Granite.Format.FormatDefault | Granite.Format.FormatPrecision Int | Granite.Format.FormatScientific Int | Granite.Format.FormatPercent Int | Granite.Format.FormatComma | Granite.Format.FormatDateTime Text | Granite.Format.FormatTemplate Text | Granite.Format.FormatSI
Granite.Data.Frame.addColumn :: Text -> Granite.Data.Frame.Column -> Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame -> Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame
Granite.Data.Frame.columnAsNum :: Granite.Data.Frame.Column -> Maybe [Double]
Granite.Data.Frame.columnAsText :: Granite.Data.Frame.Column -> [Text]
Granite.Data.Frame.columnLength :: Granite.Data.Frame.Column -> Int
Granite.Data.Frame.columnNames :: Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame -> [Text]
Granite.Data.Frame.emptyFrame :: Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame
Granite.Data.Frame.filterByRows :: [Int] -> Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame -> Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame
Granite.Data.Frame.frameLength :: Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame -> Int
Granite.Data.Frame.fromColumns :: [(Text, Granite.Data.Frame.Column)] -> Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame
Granite.Data.Frame.lookupColumn :: Text -> Granite.Data.Frame.DataFrame -> Maybe Granite.Data.Frame.Column
Granite.Data.Frame.pickRows :: [Int] -> Granite.Data.Frame.Column -> Granite.Data.Frame.Column
Granite.Format.runFormatter :: Granite.Format.Formatter -> Double -> Text
Granite.Data.Frame.uniqueText :: [Text] -> [Text]
-- Granite.Render.Pipeline: render a Granite.Spec Chart (renderChartSvg, renderChartTerminal :: Chart -> Text)
Granite.Render.Pipeline.chartToScene :: Granite.Spec.Chart -> Granite.Render.Scene.Scene
Granite.Render.Pipeline.renderChart :: Granite.Spec.Chart -> (Text, Text)
Granite.Render.Pipeline.renderChartSvg :: Granite.Spec.Chart -> Text
Granite.Render.Pipeline.renderChartTerminal :: Granite.Spec.Chart -> Text
